# STRAT.029 ? Positive Psychology (Seligman)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** psychological_frameworks
**Domain:** PSYCHOLOGICAL_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
PERMA (Positive emotion, Engagement, Relationships, Meaning, Achievement); strengths focus; learned optimism; flourishing not just surviving

## Application
Cultivate PERMA elements; identify and use strengths; practice optimism; build positive relationships; find meaning; achieve goals

## Key Values
- PERMA
- Strengths
- Optimism
- Flourishing
- Well-being

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, psychological_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
